Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava

package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting
     
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session
     
    io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.transport

  • Class
    Description
    PureJavaZenohPublisher
    Pure-Java Zenoh 1.x publisher client.
    PureJavaZenohPublisher.Builder
    Fluent builder mirroring the shape of io.mdudel.zenoh.ZenohClient.Builder so switching between the JNI-backed and pure-Java publishers is a one-line change at the call site.
    PureJavaZenohSubscriber
    Pure-Java Zenoh 1.x subscriber client.
    PureJavaZenohSubscriber.Builder
    Fluent builder mirroring PureJavaZenohPublisher.Builder so switching between the two facades at a call site is a one-line change.
    PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicListener
    Callback surface for topic discovery.
